name: Delek Logistics Partners, LP
business: The Partnership provides gathering, pipeline and other transportation services primarily for crude oil and natural gas customers, storage; wholesale marketing and terminalling services primarily for intermediate and refined product customers; and water disposal and recycling services, all through its owned assets and joint ventures located primarily in the Permian Basin (including the Delaware sub-basin) and other select areas in the Gulf Coast region. A significant portion of our existing assets are both integral to and dependent upon the success of Delek Holdings' refining operations, as many of our assets are contracted exclusively to Delek Holdings in support of its Tyler, Texas (the "Tyler Refinery"), El Dorado, Arkansas (the "El Dorado Refinery") and Big Spring, Texas (the "Big Spring Refinery"), collectively (the "Delek Refineries").
sellsTo: Delek Holdings refineries (Tyler, El Dorado, Big Spring)
third-party crude oil and natural gas producers

exposures.sentence: The Partnership provides gathering, pipeline and other transportation services primarily for crude oil and natural gas customers, storage; wholesale marketing and terminalling services primarily for intermediate and refined product customers; and water disposal and recycling services, all through its owned assets and joint ventures located primarily in the Permian Basin (including the Delaware sub-basin) and other select areas in the Gulf Coast region.
Climate change legislation or regulations restricting emissions of greenhouse gases could result in increased operating and capital costs and reduced demand for our products and services.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Gravity water disposal and recycling operations
catalysts.sentence: On January 2, 2025, we acquired Gravity and related to water disposal and recycling operations in the Permian Basin and the Bakken for total consideration of $300.8 million.

catalysts.event: Unit repurchase agreement with Delek Holdings
catalysts.sentence: On February 24, 2025, the Partnership and Delek Holdings entered into a Common Unit Purchase Agreement (the Common Unit Purchase Agreement) whereby the Partnership may repurchase common units from time to time from Delek Holdings in one or more transactions for an aggregate purchase price of up to $150.0 million through December 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Delek Permian Gathering Dropdown (assumption of purchasing and blending activities)
catalysts.sentence: On May 1, 2025, Delek Holdings transferred the Delek Permian Gathering purchasing and blending activities to the Partnership (the "DPG Dropdown").

catalysts.event: Agreement to terminate East Texas Marketing Agreement effective January 1, 2026
catalysts.sentence: On May 1, 2025, the Partnership entered into an agreement to terminate, in its entirety, the East Texas Marketing Agreement effective as of January 1, 2026.

catalysts.event: Issuance of $700.0 million 7.375% Senior Notes due 2033
catalysts.sentence: On June 30, 2025, the Partnership sold $700.0 million in aggregate principal amount of 7.375% senior notes due 2033 (the "2033 Notes") at par.

On July 1, 2025, the tariffs on certain of our FERC regulated pipelines and the throughput fees and storage fees under certain of our agreements with Delek Holdings and third parties that are subject to adjustments using FERC indexing increased 2.0%.

catalysts.event: El Dorado Purchase (sale of rail facility to Delek Holdings) effective January 1, 2026
catalysts.sentence: The El Dorado Purchase closed effective January 1, 2026.
The Tyler Tank Sale and the El Dorado Terminal Sale are expected to close on April 1, 2026 and October 1, 2027, respectively.

catalysts.event: El Dorado Terminal Sale expected close
catalysts.sentence: The Tyler Tank Sale and the El Dorado Terminal Sale are expected to close on April 1, 2026 and October 1, 2027, respectively.

catalysts.event: Gas plant expansion initial phase of operation and expected throughput increase throughout 2026
catalysts.sentence: Currently, the gas plant is in its initial phase of operation, and we foresee it increasing throughput throughout 2026.
